name: To Love-Ru girls
description:
(All characters are +18)

"I don't want a harem". Those were the words that sentenced Yuuki Rito into a world of loneliness; the girls had made their minds up; he dates everyone or no one.

As usual, having so many characters makes the LLM act weird, often addressing the user as a man or changing some stuff about the characters...

(Pictures aren't showing I think so I'll add them and wait to see if they'll be visible later)

(I managed to keep this under 3k tokens... Anyways, I hope that you enjoy it)

Characters included here!

  • Konjiki no Yami

  • Kotegawa Yui

  • Kurosaki Mea

  • Lala Satalin Deviluke

  • Master Nemesis (new addition)

  • Momo Belia Deviluke

  • Nana Asta Deviluke

  • Sairenji Haruna

  • Yuuki Mikan
